variant_name: 高父 — 产房外忧惧到极致的父亲
trigger: 高令宁急火攻心早产难产，高父在高家产房相关场景中直面女儿生死未卜的时刻。

appearance_delta.face: 忧思重到显得明显苍老，眼下疲惫，神情紧绷，面容比主设定更憔悴
appearance_delta.body: 清瘦感更突出，像在漫长等待中被抽空力气
appearance_delta.hair: 黑白掺杂的发色更显眼，整齐中透出一夜惊惧后的沉重
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 慈父愁容达到顶点，整个人像被女儿安危压弯了精神

costume_override.outfit: 家中长衫外出入产房区域，衣着仍守礼但不再讲究完整仪容

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese middle-aged father outside a childbirth chamber at night, slim and scholarly, deeply worried face aged by fear, pronounced wrinkles and exhausted eyes, black-and-gray hair neatly tied, wearing a dark plain traditional long robe in muted blue-gray and brown, standing beside candlelight and folding screens in a tense household interior, protective and anguished father aura, realistic historical Chinese emotional portrait
visual_prompt_negative: smiling expression, bright festive colors, armor, messy barbaric look, modern hospital, beard too long, muscular build, glasses
emotional_tone: 恐惧、煎熬、几近被忧惧压垮的父爱
